title: Clearview Add-Ons
description: Clearview Add-Ons offer modular customization to further modify your Clearview experience!
body: ## ![Clearview Add-Ons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e7a168eda97b6f052820af9b51dce01888a56f6.png) ## Clearview Add-Ons offer modular customization to further modify your Clearview experience. These add-ons remove or modify visual effects, allowing you to adjust the game to your personal preference for clearer gameplay. ## ![Installation:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c172699baab6c094e82d931fe3d1db3481e9e1d7.png) To install Clearview Add-Ons, simply download the appropriate version for your game. All add-ons are included in the zip folder. Open the zip folder, extract the add-ons you want to use, and place them in your resource pack folder. Make sure to set the add-ons above Clearview in your resource packs list to ensure all modifications are applied. ## ![Add-Ons:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14965168674abe106d8df114acdb03a778b1a5b0.png) **Dehumidifier:** Removes all fog, both above and underwater, to enhance distant view and underwater exploration. This add-on requires Clearview and does not support Sodium or Optifine. ![Fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95a4bfae0b925d0aeee211f578673630af3900bf.png) **Particle Purge:** Removes all particles, improving visibility in otherwise particle-dense areas. This add-on can be used standalone and supports all versions. ![Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af81bdc929f5f7dd017cec0594a067c1adf3d45a.png) **Jack-O-Gone:** Removes the pumpkin head overlay, enhancing visibility. This add-on can be used standalone and supports all versions. ![Pumpkin Head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3fff33b99a8d26d799b78bf5e9692d8fdbb766b.png) **No Scope**: Removes the spyglass overlay, enhancing visibility. This add-on can be used standalone and supports all versions. ![Spyglass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05dde366f9a3a773491a90e143190b104457249d.png) **Glintless**: Removes the enchantment glint, eliminating its distracting effect. This add-on can be used standalone and supports all versions. ![Glint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4aa2c2101b2ce5e6d8648efdbea0f4e94f73782.png) **Blazing Flames**: Adjusts screen fire height to the original while maintaining transparency, preserving the authentic effect. This add-on requires Clearview and supports all versions. ![Fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74a9fe9f534e41d9304a57863d148e4d3e5b151e.png) ## ![Compatibility:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/676d5ab2552101356e29221b4ada08025b0c0440.png) Clearview Add-Ons supports all versions of Vanilla, Optifine, and Sodium starting from 1.17, ensuring a seamless experience across various versions. Please note that the "Dehumidifier" Add-On does not support Sodium or Optifine versions. ## ![Additional Links:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f893fd942ecd3f99d4890778d85431c8b2da081.png)
